summary: Iteration 103: Subtitles Generation and Scene Regeneration Testing. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed RegenSceneRequest model to make body optional (scene_number is in URL path). Backend endpoints verified: POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/generate-subtitles returns SRT URLs, POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/regen-scene/{scene_number} starts regeneration, GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/status and /post-production-status include 'subtitles' field. Frontend PostProduction.jsx has correct data-testid attributes for subtitles UI.
critical_code_review_comments: studio.py: Fixed RegenSceneRequest model - removed redundant scene_number field (already in URL path), made body optional with Body(default=None)
studio.py: generate-subtitles endpoint correctly generates SRT files for all languages (original + localizations)
studio.py: regen-scene endpoint correctly validates project and scene existence, returns 404 for invalid inputs
studio.py: Both /status and /post-production-status endpoints include 'subtitles' field in response
PostProduction.jsx: Has all required data-testid attributes: post-production-panel, subtitles-section, generate-subtitles-btn, download-srt-{lang}
PostProduction.jsx: Subtitles section only shows when ppComplete is true (post-production is complete)
PostProduction.jsx: Button text changes from 'Gerar Legendas' to 'Regenerar' when subtitles already exist

success_rate.frontend: Code review passed - data-testid attributes verified

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test project 14e8e05fc2bd (Abraao e Izaac completo)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subtitles generation and scene regeneration endpoints verified. Test project '14e8e05fc2bd' (Abraao e Izaac completo) has narrations and can be used for subtitles testing. PostProduction component is rendered inside DirectedStudio when a project with completed production is viewed. Navigation path: Marketing > click on campaign > click Studio campaign type > select project > Step 4 (Result) > scroll to PostProduction panel. The subtitles section only appears when post-production is complete (ppComplete=true). Key data-testid attributes: 'post-production-panel', 'subtitles-section', 'generate-subtitles-btn', 'download-srt-{lang}'.

backend_generate_subtitles.details: POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/generate-subtitles returns status='complete', subtitles={lang: url}, languages=[list]

backend_regen_scene.details: POST /api/studio/projects/{id}/regen-scene/{scene_number} returns status='started', scene_number. Returns 404 for invalid project/scene

frontend_subtitles_ui.details: PostProduction.jsx has data-testid='subtitles-section' and data-testid='generate-subtitles-btn' with correct implementation

backend_tests.test_generate_subtitles_returns_srt_urls: PASS - Returns valid SRT URLs for each language
backend_tests.test_generate_subtitles_no_narrations_re: PASS - Returns 400 for project without narrations
backend_tests.test_regen_scene_invalid_scene_returns_4: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid scene number
backend_tests.test_post_production_status_structure: PASS - Has status, narrations, voice_config, subtitles fields
backend_tests.test_full_subtitles_flow: PASS - Complete flow: check status -> generate subtitles -> verify persistence

bug_fix_applied.issue: RegenSceneRequest model required scene_number in body even though it's in URL path
bug_fix_applied.fix: Removed scene_number from RegenSceneRequest, made body optional with Body(default=None)
